hero.headline: Pipe burst at *3am*? We're already on our way.
hero.subheadline: Real 24/7 emergency plumbing across Charlotte. No answering service, no callbacks — just fast repairs when you need them most.

services_section.label: EMERGENCY FIXES
services_section.heading: Every plumbing crisis we handle
services_section.subheading: From midnight pipe bursts to weekend sewer backups — we fix what breaks, when it breaks.

services.title: Emergency Pipe Repairs
services.description: Burst pipes, cracked lines, and water damage prevention. We stop the leak first, then fix it right.

services.title: Sewer Line Clearing
services.description: Backed up sewers and drain blockages cleared fast. No waiting days for an appointment.

services.title: Water Line Replacement
services.description: Corroded supply lines and pressure problems fixed with quality materials that last.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Hidden leaks behind walls and under slabs located with precision tools and repaired quickly.

services.title: Shut-off Valve Service
services.description: Broken water shut-offs and emergency valve repairs to get your water control back.

about.heading: Charlotte's true emergency plumbing response
about.body: When other plumbers say "we'll call you back," we're already loading the truck. Real 24-hour service across Charlotte means answering your emergency call personally and arriving with everything needed to fix it right the first time.

reviews.name: Aleena P.
reviews.text: Fixed our broken shut-off valve super fast. No runaround, just got it done.

reviews.name: Ahmed A.
reviews.text: Sewer backup cleared in no time. These guys know what they're doing.

reviews.name: Maria T.
reviews.text: Found our hidden leak and fixed it without tearing up half the house.

reviews.name: Parker A.
reviews.text: Cracked drain line repair was clean and quick. Barely knew they were here.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE ZONE
service_areas.heading: Emergency service across Charlotte
service_areas.subheading: Fast response to every neighborhood in the metro area

cta.heading: Plumbing emergency happening right now?
cta.body: Don't wait for morning or Monday. Call our emergency line and get a real plumber headed your way.
